name: Zombie Defense: The Last Frontier
short_description: A Single and cooperative game for 4 players, you are a fighter of a special purpose unit, your task is to destroy waves of zombies by taking convenient positions and using tactic
detailed_description:
Epidemic, you're a Special Forces unit fighter, that's why you're still alive. Your task is to hold your positions.

Single Player: Kill hordes of zombies alone.

Cooperative game: for 1-4 players.

Weapons: Check out the wide range in the arsenal and arm yourself with your favorite firearms! (currently 10 types of weapons)

Zombies: An easy target, but they get stronger and faster each time

Mutants: Difficult to kill, getting faster each time

Locations: 4 highly detailed maps on which you can think about where to hold the defense.
